channel.title: Puget Sound Large Developments — New Filings
channel.description: Notable development permits (over $5M or 20+ homes) filed in Seattle and Bellevue in the last week

item.title: Seattle: $25.0M — 509 3RD AVE
item.description: Construct alterations to existing multifamily building (Morrison Hotel) per plan.

item.title: Bellevue: $0 · 445 homes — 1101 106th Ave NE
item.description: Construction of 2 mid-rise, multifamily, residential buildings above an underground parking structure.
